hero.subtitle: We design and develop landing pages, web applications and digital tools that turn visitors into real customers.

products.title: Our products
products.subtitle: Three tools designed to solve real problems for digital businesses.
products.landingFactoryTagline: Your web presence, tailored and hassle-free
products.landingFactoryDesc: We create professional landing pages that tell your story and turn visitors into customers. Unique design, ultra-fast load times and copy that communicates your real value.
products.facturAppDesc: A simple, fast and intuitive app to manage your invoices and finances. Built for entrepreneurs and small businesses who want to get organized without wasting time.
products.botSellerDesc: Smart WhatsApp agents that handle inquiries, take orders and manage sales automatically, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

about.title: Hi, I'm Pablo
about.bio1: Software Engineer based in Buenos Aires. I come from the B2B financial world — over a decade in corporate collections, SAP migrations and account management — and since 2024 I work full-time as a Frontend Engineer at Insight Delta.
about.bio2: That combination is what makes PGO Solutions different: I understand the business from the inside. I don't just build what you ask for, I understand why you need it.

contact.title: Ready to start your project?
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you need and we'll get back to you shortly. No forms, no runaround.
contact.note: We read every inquiry carefully and respond with concrete solutions for your project.

footer.tagline: Digital solutions that drive real businesses.

sobreMi.metaDesc: Meet Pablo Olivera: Software Engineer, over a decade in B2B finance and the founder behind PGO Solutions.
sobreMi.title: Hi, I'm Pablo
sobreMi.bio1: Software Engineer with 3+ years in the tech world and over a decade before that in the corporate sector. I work at Insight Delta building products end to end: frontend architecture, AWS infrastructure and CI/CD automation.
sobreMi.bio2: I come from the B2B finance world — collections, credit, SAP migrations — and that background gives me something few developers have: I understand the business from the inside. PGO Solutions was born from that combination: software development with real business vision.
sobreMi.ctaSubtitle: If you have a project in mind, I'd love to hear about it.

trajectory.title: The corporate world
trajectory.description: Electronics technician graduate, with an innate curiosity for technology but paths led me to the financial world. I started as a collections analyst at Medife, developing a deep understanding of B2B business that is my biggest differentiator today.

trajectory.title: First technology bridge
trajectory.description: At Lincoln Electric I was the bridge between the finance department and SAP consultants during the migration from Tango to SAP. For the first time, my technical side found a real place in the corporate world. I repeated this years later at Agrofina.

trajectory.title: The definitive turn
trajectory.description: The technical curiosity I'd had for years came back strong. I started learning web development self-taught: React, TypeScript, Next.js. Learning by doing, as always. I'm now formalizing that path with a Full Stack Development Diploma.

trajectory.title: Full-time Software Engineer
trajectory.description: I made the definitive leap to the tech industry as a Frontend Engineer at Insight Delta. Product architecture, CI/CD on AWS, testing leadership with Vitest, integration with Ruby on Rails. From the financial world to tech, without losing sight of the business.

trajectory.title: PGO Solutions
trajectory.description: Born as a side project that unites the best of both worlds: the B2B knowledge from over a decade in the corporate sector and the technical skills I built along the way. I offer custom development for companies that know what they need because I was on the other side of the table.

botSeller.metaDesc: Smart WhatsApp agents that handle, sell and manage orders automatically 24 hours a day. Coming soon from PGO Solutions.
botSeller.heroSubtitle: Smart WhatsApp agents that handle inquiries, take orders and manage sales automatically. You rest, the bot works.
botSeller.heroNote: We respond via WhatsApp within 24 hours
botSeller.featuresEyebrow: What it will do for you
botSeller.featuresSubtitle: BotSeller takes care of customer service so you can focus on what matters.
botSeller.statusDesc: BotSeller is in the design and development stage. If you want to be a beta tester or simply receive updates when it's ready, let us know.
botSeller.statusCta: Sign me up as beta tester

features.title: Automatic 24/7 support
features.description: Answer customer inquiries at any time, without you having to be present.

features.title: Order taking
features.description: The bot guides the customer through the catalog, takes the order and registers it automatically.

features.title: Integrated payment links
features.description: Send payment links at the end of the conversation, without leaving WhatsApp.

features.title: Stock management
features.description: Check availability in real time and avoid confirming orders you can't fulfill.

features.title: Sales reports
features.description: See which products sell the most, at what times, and who your frequent customers are.

features.title: No-code setup
features.description: Customize messages, catalog and flows from a simple panel, no coding required.

facturApp.metaDesc: Simple, fast and intuitive invoicing for entrepreneurs and small businesses. In development by PGO Solutions.
facturApp.heroSubtitle: A simple, fast and intuitive app to manage your invoices and finances. Built for entrepreneurs and small businesses who want to get organized without wasting time.
facturApp.heroNote: We respond via WhatsApp within 24 hours
facturApp.featuresSubtitle: FacturApp is designed so you can start invoicing in 5 minutes.
facturApp.statusDesc: FacturApp is in active development. If you want to be among the first to use it when it launches, leave us your contact and we'll notify you before anyone else.
facturApp.statusCta: I want to be among the first

features.title: Invoices in seconds
features.description: Create and send professional invoices in under a minute, no complicated forms.

features.title: Client management
features.description: Save your client portfolio and access their billing history with one click.

features.title: Clear reports
features.description: View your income and monthly billing in a simple and organized way.

features.title: 100% from your phone
features.description: Designed mobile-first so you can invoice from wherever you are.

features.title: Secure and reliable
features.description: Your data protected, with automatic backups and access only for you.

features.title: No learning curve
features.description: Interface designed for non-technical users. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use FacturApp.
